--- bash completion script source ---
$ claude-profiles completions bash | head -30
# claude-profiles bash completion (generated by `claude-profiles completions bash`)
# Install: source <(claude-profiles completions bash)
#      or: claude-profiles completions bash > /etc/bash_completion.d/claude-profiles
_claude_profiles() {
  local cur prev words cword
  COMPREPLY=()
  cur="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
  prev="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD-1]}"

  # Verb position (index 1).
  if [ "${COMP_CWORD}" -eq 1 ]; then
    COMPREPLY=( $(compgen -W "init list use status drift diff new validate sync hook doctor completions help" -- "${cur}") )
    return 0
  fi

  local verb="${COMP_WORDS[1]}"
  case "${verb}" in
    use|diff|validate|sync)
      # Suggest profile names from .claude-profiles/<name>/.
      if [ -d ".claude-profiles" ] && [ "${COMP_CWORD}" -eq 2 ]; then
        local profiles
        profiles=$(find .claude-profiles -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -not -name '.*' 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.claude-profiles/||')
        COMPREPLY=( $(compgen -W "${profiles}" -- "${cur}") )
        return 0
      fi
      ;;
    hook)
      if [ "${COMP_CWORD}" -eq 2 ]; then
        COMPREPLY=( $(compgen -W "install uninstall" -- "${cur}") )
        return 0

--- bash sourcing smoke test ---
_claude_profiles
function defined

--- bash COMP for 'use <TAB>' must return profile names ---
completions returned: prod ci _components dev with-root dev-strict

--- zsh sourcing smoke test ---
_claude_profiles is a shell function from /tmp/c3p-zsh.zsh
